hero.description: Speak with Dr. Jyotika Kanwar, MD Psychiatry, for confidential online consultations focused on your mental health, emotional wellbeing, and recovery.

badge.label: Dr. Jyotika Kanwar
badge.quote: MD Psychiatry, PGIMER Chandigarh Confidential | Evidence-based | Patient-first care

support.title: Specialized Support
support.description: Compassionate care tailored to your unique psychological needs and life circumstances.

cards.title: Anxiety & Panic Disorders
cards.description: Evidence-based approaches to manage overwhelming stress and help you regain control of your daily life.

cards.title: Depression & Mood Concerns
cards.description: Navigating the complexities of mood disorders with empathy and clinical precision.

cards.title: ADHD & Focus
cards.description: Comprehensive evaluation and management for adults navigating executive function challenges.

cards.title: Trauma Recovery
cards.description: Specialized therapeutic interventions for processing past experiences in a gentle, secure environment.

cards.title: Addiction & Substance Use
cards.description: For alcohol, nicotine, cannabis, prescription medication misuse, or other substance-related concerns. Non-judgmental support for understanding dependence, managing cravings, preventing relapse, and planning safe recovery.

cards.title: Child & Adolescent Concerns
cards.description: For attention issues, behavioral concerns, emotional difficulties, anxiety, academic stress, and parent guidance.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.description: Simple, private, and convenient online care.

steps.title: Book Your Slot
steps.description: Choose a suitable consultation time and share basic details securely.

steps.title: Join Online Consultation
steps.description: Connect with Dr. Jyotika through a private video consultation from your home.

steps.title: Continued Care
steps.description: Access your treatment plans and schedule follow-ups through your dashboard.
